input: Run session protocol on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected session protocol output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the session protocol workflow

input: Apply session protocol to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive session protocol analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to session protocol
